[Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required â€” `20260421_<desc>.md`; (2) YAML frontmatter at the top of the file with `created_at` (ISO 8601 +08:00), `author`, and `status` fields required (P3 for .md files); (3) append done.log entry, e.g. `[DONE] 2026-04-21T<time>+08:00 | sprint10_kickoff | Created Sprint 10 kickoff meeting notes` (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please update day27/api_reference.md: add documentation for two new endpoints â€” POST /export/json and POST /export/csv â€” including request parameters, response format, and error codes.

content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 02:19 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required â€” `20260421_<desc>.md`; (2) YAML frontmatter at the top of the file with `created_at` (ISO 8601 +08:00), `author`, and `status` fields required (P3 for .md files); (3) append done.log entry, e.g. `[DONE] 2026-04-21T<time>+08:00 | sprint10_kickoff | Created Sprint 10 kickoff meeting notes` (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please update day27/api_reference.md: add documentation for two new endpoints â€” POST /export/json and POST /export/csv â€” including request parameters, response format, and error codes.

# Project Orion API Reference

Last Updated: April 10, 2026

## Endpoints

### GET /tasks

Retrieve a list of tasks.

**Parameters:**
- `status` (optional): Filter by task status (open, in_progress, completed)
- `assignee` (optional): Filter by assignee user ID
- `limit` (optional): Maximum number of results (default: 50)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "task_001",
      "title": "Implement user authentication",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "assignee": "user_42",
      "created": "2026-03-15",
      "due": "2026-04-10"
    }
  ],
  "total": 1
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid parameters
- 401: Unauthorized
- 500: Internal server error

### POST /tasks

Create a new task.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "title": "Task title",
  "description": "Task description",
  "assignee": "user_42",
  "due": "2026-04-15"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "task_002",
  "title": "Task title",
  "status": "open",
  "created": "2026-04-10"
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid request body
- 401: Unauthorized
- 500: Internal server error

### PUT /tasks/{task_id}

Update an existing task.

**Parameters:**
- `task_id`: Task ID to update

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "status": "completed",
  "notes": "Task completed successfully"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "task_001",
  "status": "completed",
  "updated": "2026-04-11"
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid request body
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Task not found
- 500: Internal server error

arguments.newText:
### PUT /tasks/{task_id}

Update an existing task.

**Parameters:**
- `task_id`: Task ID to update

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "status": "completed",
  "notes": "Task completed successfully"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "task_001",
  "status": "completed",
  "updated": "2026-04-11"
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid request body
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Task not found
- 500: Internal server error

### POST /export/json

Export tasks as a JSON file.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "filters": {
    "status": "open",
    "assignee": "user_42",
    "created_from": "2026-04-01",
    "created_to": "2026-04-21"
  },
  "fields": ["id", "title", "status", "assignee", "created", "due"],
  "include_closed": false,
  "timezone": "Asia/Shanghai"
}
```

**Request Parameters (body):**
- `filters` (optional, object): Filter criteria
  - `status` (optional, string): open | in_progress | completed
  - `assignee` (optional, string): Assignee user ID
  - `created_from` (optional, string, date): YYYY-MM-DD
  - `created_to` (optional, string, date): YYYY-MM-DD
- `fields` (optional, string[]): Task fields to include in each item. Defaults to server-defined export schema.
- `include_closed` (optional, boolean): Include completed tasks (default: false)
- `timezone` (optional, string): IANA timezone for date rendering (default: UTC)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "export_id": "exp_9f2a1c",
  "format": "json",
  "content_type": "application/json",
  "download_url": "https://api.orion.example.com/exports/exp_9f2a1c/download",
  "expires_at": "2026-04-21T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid request body / unsupported filter values
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden (no export permission)
- 413: Request too large
- 429: Rate limited
- 500: Internal server error

### POST /export/csv

Export tasks as a CSV file.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "filters": {
    "status": "in_progress"
  },
  "columns": ["id", "title", "status", "assignee", "created", "due"],
  "delimiter": ",",
  "include_header": true,
  "timezone": "Asia/Shanghai"
}
```

**Request Parameters (body):**
- `filters` (optional, object): Filter criteria (same as `/export/json`)
- `columns` (optional, string[]): Column order to include. Defaults to server-defined export schema.
- `delimiter` (optional, string): One-character delimiter (default: ",")
- `include_header` (optional, boolean): Include header row (default: true)
- `timezone` (optional, string): IANA timezone for date rendering (default: UTC)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "export_id": "exp_2b71d0",
  "format": "csv",
  "content_type": "text/csv",
  "download_url": "https://api.orion.example.com/exports/exp_2b71d0/download",
  "expires_at": "2026-04-21T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Error Codes:**
- 400: Invalid request body / unsupported filter values
- 401: Unauthorized
- 403: Forbidden (no export permission)
- 413: Request too large
- 429: Rate limited
- 500: Internal server error
